ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software entry */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the software */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the software can be found */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the software's functionality */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software's license */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the software (e.g., database, middleware, framework) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the software entry was last updated */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the software was deprecated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the software (e.g., active, deprecated, obsolete) */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies for the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL where the license text can be found */,
  "license_version" TEXT /* Version of the license */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the license information was last updated */,
  "compatible_licenses" TEXT /* List of other licenses that are compatible with this one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software usage instance */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using the software */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the software was added to the project */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Current status of the software usage (e.g., active, deprecated, removed) */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the usage record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_usage_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the software information */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the software information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software the notification is about */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new release, deprecation, license change) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software ("software_id")
)
